unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My holidays passed quickly, but I did not send cards to my friends.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 死鹅拿的(send)，原来是给你寄(send)来的礼物。
邮寄(post)的卡片(card)就是明信片(postcard)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 死皮赖脸地抹油(spoil)，彻底损坏(spoil)了心情。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 母亲看见有颜色的鸟在博物馆(museum)里展示。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 酒吧(pub)里立刻(lic)聚集了公共(public)人群。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 朋友(friend)加上ly变成形容词，表示友好的(friendly)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 等候(wait)服务的人就是服务员(waiter)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then he lent me a book.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 老是结束(lend)借给(lend)别人东西，关系就变好了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On the last day I made a big decision.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 底下的西声(decision)，是大家做出的决定(decision)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 我的整个(whole)身体掉进了大洞(hole)里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 罪恶之歌(single)是唯一的(single)线索。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.
A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Italy(意大利)的派生词，表示意大利的(Italian)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 老在里面(line)画排成行(line)的线。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My holidays passed quickly, but I did not send cards to my friends.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 快的(quick)加上ly变成副词，表示迅速地(quickly)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 死守着盆子(spend)，花费(spend)了所有积蓄。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: borrow 是 “借入” 的意思，常用的结构是 borrow sth. from sb.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 波浪里划船(borrow)去向别人借(borrow)东西。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a few表示肯定，有几个(a few)；few表示否定，几乎没有。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On the last day I made a big decision.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a decision vs make a choice
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 做(make)一个决定(decision)就是下定决心。
